cited_facts.why_it_matters: Describes the DID amendment functionality but does not specify the default vote stance of the source or stable release.

output_json.decision_summary: The provided facts describe the functionality, voting process, and version introduction of the DID amendment. However, none of the facts explicitly state the default vote (YES or NO) associated with the latest stable release source. Without explicit evidence of the default vote stance, the task rule requires outputting UNKNOWN.
